commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: But you, beloved, building up yourselves in your most holy faith, praying in the Holy Spirit, building yourselves: To forever reform themselves according to the Holy Spirit’s guidance; in other words, by building congregations up, by their preaching, in the teaching of the Holy Spirit. (Oecumenius) praying in the Holy Spirit: To pray in the Spirit always means to offer prayer to God with a clean conscience and a pure faith. If we live a good life the Holy Spirit dwells with us and we can receive what we ask for. (Ambrosiaster Eph 6:18).

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Building yourselves: That is, raising by your actions a spiritual building, founded 1. upon faith; 2. on the love of God; 3. upon hope, whilst you are awaiting for the mercies of God, and the reward of eternal life; 4. joined with the great duty of prayer. (Witham)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
